source_pr.title: ddl: support alter table .. truncate partition
source_pr.body: ### What problem does this PR solve? Fix https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/8435 ### What is changed and how it works? Support alter table truncate partition ### Check List Tests - Unit test @ciscoxll @winkyao @zimulala --- This change is [](https://reviewable.io/reviews/pingcap/tidb/8624)

symptoms: result := s.tk.MustQuery("select * from employees order by id") (ddl/db_test.go)
failure_signature: result := s.tk.MustQuery("select * from employees order by id") (ddl/db_test.go)
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.
